name: Material UI setup fetches library-specific guide and uses custom decorator
query: How do I get Chromatic to snapshot our components in both the light and dark MUI theme?
context: The project uses @mui/material with a custom theme. No @storybook/addon-themes installed yet.
expected_behavior: Fetches the Material UI getting-started guide from the storybook addon-themes repo
Does not use withThemeByClassName or withThemeByDataAttribute
Uses pluckThemeFromContext and/or initializeThemeState to bridge Storybook globals with MUI's ThemeProvider
Creates .storybook/modes.ts with light and dark theme modes
Shows the complete custom decorator implementation
success_criteria: The response does not use withThemeByClassName or withThemeByDataAttribute
The custom decorator reads from Storybook globals to select the MUI theme
The decorator's registered theme keys match the keys used in allModes
